text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. For example, when you type a sentence into a translation tool, NLP breaks it down to produce an accurate version in another language. It also powers sentiment analysis, which can detect whether a review or comment is positive, negative, or neutral. Additionally, many chatbots use NLP to understand your questions and provide helpful responses, like when you ask for customer support online. Overall, NLP makes it possible for machines to read, interpret, and even reply to text in a way that feels natural and useful.
